Homepage Designs

Three distinct aesthetics, all professionally crafted for Musso Family Dentistry. Click to preview each design.

Digital Sanctuary

Clinical Precision meets Architectural Luxury

Navy & green clinical precision with GSAP animations, stacking cards, and telemetry feed

View Design

Friendly & Approachable

Warm, Casual, Family-Focused

Organic shapes, stacked images, marquee animations, and playful floating elements

View Design

Bold & Dramatic

High-Contrast, Modern, Impactful

Full-bleed hero, accordion services, asymmetric layouts, and cinematic typography

View Design

All designs are fully responsive and built with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, and GSAP.
